title: PAL Pack Schema v1
description: Schema for PAL rule packs. Uses declarative comparators — no expression parser needed.

schema_version.description: v1.1 adds the optional window field on conditions for rolling-window aggregations

applicability.description: Determines whether this pack is auto-loaded for a given dataset

metric_aliases.description: Maps snake_case canonical metric IDs to Windows counter path patterns (regex or exact). Used during normalization.

recommendations.description: Named recommendation definitions. Rules reference these by ID.

always.description: If true, pack always loads regardless of dataset content

requires_any.description: Pack loads if at least one of these canonical metric IDs is present in the dataset

requires_all.description: Pack loads only if all of these canonical metric IDs are present

HostContextThreshold.description: A threshold value derived from host context (e.g., total RAM, CPU count)

host_context.description: Which host context variable to use as the base value

factor.description: Multiply the host_context value by this factor (e.g., 0.10 for 10%)

minimum.description: Clamp the computed threshold to at least this value (e.g., 64 MB floor)

maximum.description: Clamp the computed threshold to at most this value

instance.description: Instance filter: exact name (e.g., '_total'), '*' matches any, omit to match all

aggregation.description: How to reduce the time series to a single value for comparison

operator.description: Comparison operator applied to aggregated value vs threshold

duration_percent.description: Percentage of samples that must satisfy the condition for the rule to fire. Default 1 means any single sample triggers it.

window.description: When present, the aggregation is evaluated over each rolling window. Rule fires if any window satisfies the condition. Requires schema_version pal.pack/v1.1.

duration_seconds.description: Rolling window length in seconds (e.g., 300 for a 5-minute window)

step_seconds.description: Window stride in seconds. Defaults to the dataset sample interval when omitted.

min_samples.description: Skip the window if fewer than this many valid samples fall inside it

AppliesWhen.description: Per-rule applicability guard evaluated at rule evaluation time (not pack load time)

requires_any.description: Rule runs if at least one of these metric IDs is present

requires_all.description: Rule runs only if all of these metric IDs are present

rule_id.description: Unique kebab-case identifier within the pack

summary.description: One-sentence finding summary shown in the report

explanation.description: Longer explanation of why this finding matters and what to investigate

conditions.description: All conditions must be satisfied for the rule to fire

recommendations.description: IDs of recommendations defined in the pack-level recommendations object
